description: Structural contract for triage-decision.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas). Triage selects/rejects inbox tasks and estimates cycle size before plan-review.

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: selected_tasks
required_sections.fail_message: ## Selected Tasks (or ANCHOR:selected_tasks) missing — Triage must list which inbox items advance to Scout

required_sections.name: rejected_tasks
required_sections.fail_message: ## Rejected Tasks (or ANCHOR:rejected_tasks) missing — Triage must record deferred/skipped items

required_sections.name: cycle_size_estimate
required_sections.fail_message: ## Cycle Size estimate missing — Triage must classify cycle as small|medium|large for plan-review gate

required_content.name: size_value
required_content.fail_message: size value (small|medium|large|XS|S|M|L|XL) not found — Triage must declare cycle size to satisfy gate_triage_to_plan_review
